phrases.intent_en: Is entry to the cathedral free today?
phrases.text_local: L'entrée de la cathédrale est gratuite aujourd'hui ?
phrases.pronunciation: lon-TRAY duh lah kah-tay-DRAL eh grah-TWEET oh-zhoor-DWEE
phrases.cultural_note: Main cathedral entry is usually free; tower/roof access is separate when available.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I book a guided tour of the cathedral?
phrases.text_local: Où est-ce qu'on réserve une visite guidée de la cathédrale ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo ess kohn ray-ZAIRV oon vee-ZEET gee-DAY duh lah kah-tay-DRAHL
phrases.cultural_note: Guided tours of the cathedral are available in several languages.

phrases.intent_en: Where are the Chagall stained-glass windows?
phrases.text_local: Où sont les vitraux de Chagall ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo son lay vee-TROH duh shah-GAL
phrases.cultural_note: The Chagall windows are a highlight for many visitors—best seen with natural daylight.

responses.english: In the apse, at the back.

phrases.intent_en: How long does a full visit usually take?
phrases.text_local: La visite complète dure combien de temps ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah vee-ZEET kom-PLET dur kom-BYAN duh tahn
phrases.cultural_note: Most visitors spend 45–75 minutes depending on pace and photo stops.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I book tower access?
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je réserver l'accès aux tours ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo pwee-zh ray-zair-VAY lak-SAY oh toor
phrases.cultural_note: Tower access is separate and can require advance booking depending on season.

responses.english: At the ticket desk, at the entrance.
